parameters: Go outside? (Return to the World Map)
完了までウェイト = true
Go outside? (Return to the World Map)
完了までウェイト = true
フキダシアイコンの消去
フキダシアイコンの消去
An unfamiliar luxury car was parked in front of our apartment building.
...I could only think of one thing when I saw it, could it be...
Seems like I was right on the money. I saw Shino getting out of it.
\SA[130]Are you really okay? You don't seem to be fully recovered yet...
\se[21-nb]Got it. Well then, see you tomorrow... Oh.
Erhm, Shino-sensei still doesn't seem to be doing great.
I really do feel bad for making her do all this.
Normally, I should be the one doing it, but could I trouble
you to see her off to her door?
He made that request of me, while looking me straight into the eyes.
I was always planning on doing that anyway, of course.
So it's only natural that I'd grant that request.
That's easy enough, I told him.
\SE[3]Great. I think she'd feel a lot better being by your side too.
\se[21]\SA[130]I'm sorry, I really must be going now...
I'll definitely make this one up to you next time.
スライドスピード = def
And so I saw him off along with Shino.
I feel like she wasn't doing great last time either.
\sa[130]\SE[54-nb]Yeah, I think I'm just a bit tired.
Eheheh, maybe I was pushing myself too hard for this tutoring gig.
To begin with, she's the sort to overwork herself.
But if she herself understands then it's probably fine.
Still, last time, and this time too...
Keiichi-kun really is one good kid, huh?
\SE[21]Y-Yeah, Keiichi-sa... kun is amazing enough to put adults to shame, I tell you.
--I shouldn't be making her chat like this.
She's not feeling great as it is.
I should get her home as soon as I can.
I took her hand, and dragged her back to her home.
I'm starting to feel better, so let's have dinner together?
Just as she said, the color was starting to return to her face.
I have to work hard towards my own goals too, to not lose to her.
I stroked the pamphlet of the university of my choice that was in my bag,
and settled my heart on it.
Would you like to view [Shino's viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)

...It had become night, and just as I was about to enter the apartment building,
I spotted two familiar faces next to the entrance.
Rino nee-san and... my father, were discussing something.
Both Rino nee-san and my father worked at the same company.
I'd heard that it was thanks to my father's influence, and his
connections at the company that Rino nee-san got her job there.
---- She'd have been fine even without all of that though, with her competency.
Either way, I have no business getting between them, if it's work related.
\SE[5][It's thanks to you, uncle... no, chief, that I am where I am.]
Hearing her talk like that, I felt that I was somehow missing a few
pieces of the story... and so I quickly left the place.

\SE[8]That takes care of--... that. Wah, \n[1], morning--!
You woke up on time today, I'm so proud.
\SE[33-nb]Here to put out your trash too? Everyone's working so hard for our sakes,
so we gotta do what we can ourselves, don't we~? I'm so proud of you--
\sa[123]\SE[6]What are you planning on doing for today? I'm planning on going to the library to study~.
It's free attendance but we still can't get careless--!
\sa[126]\SE[29]...And honestly, at home there's too many other temptations, like my games.
\SE[44]Not that I think it's ever going to happen, but if you're in the mood to study
for once, I'll be in the library around noon, so come and join me?
\sa[124]\SE[54-nb]Not that I have any hope though~, you know~?
スライドスピード = def
...I didn't have any plans on studying to begin with, but having
her fan me on so much makes me want to betray her expectations.
The library around noon, huh... Maybe I should go and check in on her then.
アニメーションタイプ = def
\SM[double]\SE[28-nb]Two more days, huh... I can't wait~♪ Eheheh♥
\SM[slidef]\SE[15-nb]There we go... Ah, there's a flyer deep inside.
I wonder what it is... wuh, wah~♥
Yay, yay~! They delayed it 3 times but I can finally play it,
\sa[124]\SE[31-nb]A game I've been waiting on for so long is finally releasing~!
\SM[double]I'm so happy, it's blown away all my fatigue from today~♥
She jumped all over, while holding my hands.
...So much so that I don't know where to point my eyes. I can't help but
have my eyes stolen by the jiggling 'swellings' on her chest.
\sa[126]\SE[8]...Wuh, sorry, I couldn't help myself there.
\SE[2]Fufuh--, I know it's a bit late, but great work today too.
Today's dinner's gonna be mapo tofu, on request from onee-chan~♪
\SM[double]\SE[28-nb]Two more days, huh... I can't wait~♪ Eheheh♥
Feeling honestly envious that she had a hobby she could be so passionate about,
I simply gazed at her as she looked deeply at the flyer in her hands.
アニメーションタイプ = def
\SM[tremble]\SE[1]The extra thick milkshake sounds great, but so does a super sweet latte...
Maybe I should just get bo--, no I can't, I can't...--
Right from the start of the day, she was waffling about in front
of the vending machines, unable to decide what drink to buy.
...As usual, the machines were full of strange drinks that only
someone like her would ever drink.
\SE[56-nb]Nobody's looking anyway, so if I gulp them down secretly, they'll be 0 calories (?).
Eheheh... I dunno, maybe I'll do just that...
Succumbing to the devilish temptation, she was just about to press the button
when I softly tapped her on the shoulder.
I was unable to control myself~~!
M-Morning~♪ Eheheh, you're up early today...?
\SE[27]M-Me? I was erhm, you see... I was just trying to pick
out a singular drink to get, nothing else, you know?
...When I told her that I saw it all, her face slowly started turning red
like a tomato and her body started quivering from embarrassment.
\SM[tremble]\sa[128]\SE[55-nb]If you were watching then you should have said something.....
...I was thinking of teasing her a bit, but seeing her on the
verge of tears made me change my plans instantly.
\sa[123]\SE[8]Eh? "Let's buy them both and share them"?.... Wuh?
Are you sure? But you don't like sweet stuff all that much, right?
\sa[133]\SE[22]Eheheh, thanks. What's up with you? You're suddenly being very sweet.
...I curtly replied with [Only for today] and gulped down
half of the extra thick milkshake I just bought.
...It's 10 times sweeter than I ever expected it to be....
\SM[double]\sa[133]\SE[21]What a nice day it is today~, fufufufuhn~♪
Stuff like this is fine too every so often, if I can see that smile in return.
And so I spent a short but sweet slice of time with Shino.
スライドスピード = def
アニメーションタイプ = def

\se[15-nb]Fufuh--, it's nothing, I just felt like waiting here for you~.
\SE[12]Really, I had no reason, okay? ...I just wanted to see your face.
Honestly, if she really was waiting for me, then I'm very happy.
But I'm still not mature enough to properly express my feelings about stuff like this.
\SE[10]Now then~, I've seen you back in so I guess I'll go home myself~♪
...Feeling whimsical myself, I wanted to do something for this
childhood friend of mine, in lieu of telling her my true feelings.
Wah, you'll buy me a can of juice!?
Yay, yay~. I'm not going to hold back then~♪
\se[13-nb]Fufuh--, that's the 2nd good thing that happened because I waited for you~
If one's the juice, then I wonder what the other was.
When I asked her, she just laughed mischievously.
\SM[rock]\SE[11]Then please make it happen, mister~♪ To the vending machines~!
As I watched her laughing and pulling me by the hand,
I was thinking the same thing as her.

アニメーションタイプ = def
I wondered if Shino was waiting for Rino nee-san to come back.
\se[15-nb]Fufuh--, not really, I just felt like waiting here for you~.
...Me? Was I forgetting some promise I made with her, or something?
I looked back upon my recent memories, and came up blank.
